title: 3.28.0 Hotfix 8
changes: Fixed a bug where the Wombgift locker affinity did not function.
Fixed a bug where some Azurite Encounters weren't completing in the Frozen Hollow and Petrified Forest Delve biomes.
Fixed a bug where Wild Rogue Exiles with additional Rewards could sometimes drop Honoured, Sacred or Miraged Incubators.
